allow: PowerShell(\(Get-Command go -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source; go version; $env:PATH -split ';' | Select-String -Pattern 'go')
PowerShell(\(Get-Command wails -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source; wails version 2>&1; wails doctor 2>&1)
PowerShell(Write-Output "GOPATH=$\(go env GOPATH\)"; Write-Output "GOBIN=$\(go env GOBIN\)")

Bash(cd "/c/Users/justf/Program Files/Go/pkg/mod/github.com/schollz/croc/v10@v10.4.14/src" && cat models/constants.go 2>/dev/null | head -40; echo "=== utils rand ==="; grep -n "func GetRandomName\\|func ByteCountDecimal" utils/utils.go)

PowerShell(& "$env:USERPROFILE\\go\\bin\\wails.exe" build 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 8; Write-Output "=== OUTPUT ==="; Get-ChildItem "build\\bin" | Select-Object Name, @{N='MB';E={[math]::Round\($_.Length/1MB,1\)}})

PowerShell(Start-Process "build\\bin\\Croc Transfer.exe"; Start-Sleep -Seconds 4; $p = Get-Process "Croc Transfer" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($p\) { Write-Output "RUNNING pid=$\($p.Id\) mem=$\([math]::Round\($p.WorkingSet64/1MB,1\)\)MB" } else { Write-Output "EXITED - crashed on startup" })

Bash(cd "/c/Users/justf/Program Files/Go/pkg/mod/github.com/wailsapp/wails/v2@v2.13.0/internal/frontend/runtime" && ls; echo "=== search ==="; grep -rn "DropTarget\\|dropTarget\\|canResolve\\|drop-target" --include=*.js . | head -25)

PowerShell(Start-Process "build\\bin\\Croc Transfer.exe"; Start-Sleep -Seconds 4; $p = Get-Process "Croc Transfer" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($p\) { Write-Output "RUNNING pid=$\($p.Id\)" } else { Write-Output "EXITED" })
Bash(cd "/c/Users/justf/Program Files/Go/pkg/mod/github.com/wailsapp/wails/v2@v2.13.0" && grep -rn "Unknown message from front end" --include=*.go . | head)
